issue_summary: Make FilenameUtils equals methods case-sensitive, with some optional system case matching
javadoc_before:
/** * Checks whether two filenames are equal using the case rules of the system. *

* No processing is performed on the filenames other than comparison. * The check is case sensitive on Unix and case insensitive on Windows. * * @param filename1 the first filename to query, may be null * @param filename2 the second filename to query, may be null * @return true if the filenames are equal, null equals null */
javadoc_after:
/** * Checks whether two filenames are equal exactly. *

* No processing is performed on the filenames other than comparison, * thus this is merely a null-safe case-sensitive equals. * * @param filename1 the first filename to query, may be null * @param filename2 the second filename to query, may be null * @return true if the filenames are equal, null equals null */
